name: verify-gate-steer
prediction: fewer verify-gate.unverified-end events; pass-rate rises on parens/equil iff the failures were compliance-bound (ended without running the gate) rather than capability-bound (ran it, couldn't fix red). Diagnostic either way.

messages.PI_MSG_VG_STEER: [verify-gate] STOP — do not end this turn. You edited files but no gate has passed. Run {gate} NOW and paste its full output. Only decide after you see it: if red, fix the code and re-run until green. Ending with 'done' but no green {gate} is a failed task.{ctn}
